title: Domain Errors, State, and Resource Lifecycles · Program Brief: Oop Exception Translation
summary: Keep loan state transitions, storage sessions, and notification failures recoverable and observable. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop exception translation increment in a stateful failure-resilient service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate storage, network, and parsing failures at ownership boundaries while preserving causes for operators.
Define a small domain error hierarchy that communicates recoverable business failures without leaking infrastructure details.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
